dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal specifies RSI(2) which is not in the allowed indicator list. Used rsi_7 as the closest available RSI indicator. Exit conditions marked as AUTHOR_SILENT in original; implemented mean-reversion exit at RSI midpoint (50) for both long and short positions. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal switches between long and short based on RSI thresholds.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal specifies RSI(2) which is not in the allowed indicator list. Used rsi_7 as the closest available RSI indicator. Exit conditions marked as AUTHOR_SILENT in original; implemented mean-reversion exit at RSI midpoint (50) for both long and short positions. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal switches between long and short based on RSI thresholds.

source_rule_text: Enter long when RSI(2) falls below 10; enter short when RSI(2) rises above 90.
